creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2009-06-01 01:30:26 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    UPDATING 
    devel/viewvc         Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    devel/viewvc/files   viewvc.in 
  Log:
  - update viewvc to version 1.1.0 (released 13-May-2009)
  - remove MAKE_JOBS_SAFE from Makefile, since this port is NO_BUILD
  - make viewvc rc script work again
  
  viewvc.conf and templates are not compatible to 1.0.x version, even the
  database scripts has changed.
  For details see:
  http://viewvc.tigris.org/source/browse/*checkout*/viewvc/trunk/docs/upgrading-howto.html
  
  Changes: http://viewvc.tigris.org/source/browse/*checkout*/viewvc/tags/1.1.0/CHANGES
  
  PR:             ports/135056
  Submitted by:   olli hauer <ohauer@gmx.de>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.805     +9 -1      ports/UPDATING
  1.38      +6 -6      ports/devel/viewvc/Makefile
  1.17      +3 -3      ports/devel/viewvc/distinfo
  1.2       +2 -2      ports/devel/viewvc/files/viewvc.in
  1.10      +153 -25   ports/devel/viewvc/pkg-plist
